scripts.sanity: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$envFile='.env.local'; if (Test-Path $envFile) { Get-Content $envFile | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^(?!#)\s*([^=]+)=(.*)$') { [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($matches[1], $matches[2], 'Process') } } }; sanity dev"
scripts.sanity:deploy: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$envFile='.env.local'; if (Test-Path $envFile) { Get-Content $envFile | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^(?!#)\s*([^=]+)=(.*)$') { [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($matches[1], $matches[2], 'Process') } } }; sanity deploy"
